svg.title: Daily cash activity notes display

g.text: Office use only · reviewed as part of the DCAR set
Report date: Sat, Jun 26 · Generated 11:02 PM · Yellow Point Lodge · (250) 245-7422
Pairs with: DCAR upper/lower sections + appendix reports
Staff tips $48.00 — handed to handwritten tip sheet, not posted
to ledger. Coded adjustment #12 logged by D.M. Keep visible
amount carried to payments-by-type. Rate noted for trace.
Deposit refund (14-day notice) on Beach Cabin booking — see deposits-applied appendix. One cashed-out item under
GC; tax breakdown matches appendix subtotal. Upper and lower sections balance.
These notes do not print on guest-facing documents.
